name: Actility ThingPark Enterprise LoRaWAN API
what_it_does: Enterprise LoRaWAN network infrastructure with REST API — enabling telecom operators, enterprises, and IoT solution providers to build and manage carrier-grade LoRaWAN networks via ThingPark Wireless (network operator platform) and ThingPark Enterprise (private networks), with device management, Application Server API for data routing, and geolocation services.
use_cases: Managing LoRaWAN devices and routing profiles via Actility ThingPark API for enterprise IoT fleet
Receiving device uplinks via ThingPark Application Server API for IoT data pipeline integration
Managing ThingPark gateways and base stations via API for LoRa network infrastructure operations
Configuring ThingPark data routing and transformations via API for multi-destination data delivery
Querying ThingPark device statistics and network KPIs via API for network operations monitoring
not_for: Simple maker/hobbyist LoRaWAN (Actility is enterprise/carrier grade — use TTN for makers)
Organizations without telecom or enterprise IoT budget (premium pricing)
best_when: A telecom operator, utility company, or enterprise needs carrier-grade LoRaWAN network infrastructure — with ThingPark's proven reliability in national network deployments across 50+ countries.
avoid_when: You need community free networking, simple device connectivity, or are a small team without enterprise budget.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow. Bearer token auth. Scoped access per resource type. Token expiry with refresh. Webhook (HTTP Application Server) for device uplink delivery. ThingPark DX API documented at dx-api.thingpark.io. Multiple ThingPark API products: Core/Location/X. Operator account required. REST API for all management operations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; operator and enterprise pricing only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise custom pricing; operator licensing; ThingPark X platform pricing
pricing.notes: French company (Vélizy-Villacoublay). Founded 2010 by Mike Mulica. Raised €75M+. Pioneer in LoRaWAN commercialization (co-founded LoRa Alliance). Used by 50+ telecom operators globally (Orange, SK Telecom, Proximus, Comcast, etc.). ThingPark Wireless for public network operators. ThingPark Enterprise for private networks. ThingPark X for IoT application enablement. ThingPark Location for TDOA geolocation. Deployed in smart cities, smart metering, utilities, logistics globally. Largest commercial LoRaWAN footprint by network operator deployments.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OAuth2. Webhook for device uplink. ISO27001 and GDPR compliant. LoRaWAN expertise required. Enterprise pricing and procurement. Annual contract. ThingPark DX API documented publicly. Multiple API product families (Core, Location, X) with different endpoints.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Device reads idempotent by DevEUI. Gateway reads idempotent. Routing profile reads idempotent. Device creation idempotent by DevEUI. Message delivery not guaranteed (LoRaWAN best-effort).
known_agent_gotchas: Multiple ThingPark API products (Core, Location, X) — different base URLs per product
OAuth2 token expiry — implement refresh logic for long-running agents
LoRaWAN expertise required (DevEUI, routing profiles, AS-ID concepts)
Enterprise procurement process — cannot self-serve sign up
Annual contract minimum — high commitment for small deployments

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. ISO27001, GDPR compliant. OAuth2 client credentials with scoped access. Carrier-grade security for telecom deployments. French company — EU jurisdiction. LoRaWAN AES-128 encryption at protocol level. Enterprise SLA with security guarantees. Operator accounts have additional security controls. Geolocation data requires privacy controls.
